sections.paragraph:
περιελαύνω impf. περιήλαυνον (since Hom. [where it is found in tmesis]; pap; Jos., Bell., 3, 17; 4, 115) drive about of livestock (Palaeph. p. 26, 9; PTebt 53, 18 [II b.c.]) ὧδε καὶ ἐκεῖ (v.l. κἀκεῖσε) περιήλαυνεν αὐτά (i.e. τὰ πρόβατα) he was driving them about, here and there Hs 6, 2, 7.

impf. impf. = imperfect

Hom Hom , VIII b.c.—List 5

pap pap = papyrus, -yri

Jos. Jos. = Josephus. This abbr. used when follow by title; I a.d.—Lists 5

Palaeph Palaeph , date uncertain—List 5

PTebt PTebt = The Tebtunis Papyri—List 4

v.l. v.l. = varia lectio (variant reading)

i.e.

i.e. = id est (that is)

I.-E. Indo-European

Hs Hs = Similitudes

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 800
